close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs:22 'pub struct EnvBackend { var: String }' has no #[derive(Debug)]. Idiomatic Rust derives Debug on almost everything by default, and there is no security reason to suppress it here: 'var' is a variable NAME (e.g. API_KEY), not the secret VALUE — the name is not sensitive. Without Debug, callers that hold Arc<dyn SecretStore> downcast to a concrete type cannot {:?}-print the backend, and any wrapping struct that does derive Debug must skip this field. Fix: #[derive(Debug)] on EnvBackend. Sibling crate secretx-file/src/lib.rs:40 has the same omission — both should be addressed for workspace consistency.
title: Missing Debug derive on EnvBackend
